data.title: Bobbie expresses disappointment over lack of transparency in Healthy Florida First infant formula testing, causing potential alarm.
data.description: In HEATH, Ohio, a recent report on infant formula testing by Healthy Florida First has raised concerns. The initiative has not provided crucial details on the products, methodology, and results despite requests. Bobbie, a leading authority in baby products, is troubled by the lack of transparency from Healthy Florida First. This could unduly worry American families. Notably, discrepancies were found between the report's infographic and data table, adding to the uncertainty surrounding the findings.

data.title: Ragnarok: The New World tops Apple App Store charts in Taiwan, Hong Kong, and Macau on Jan 15, 2026.
data.description: Seoul, South Korea - On January 16, 2026, GRAVITY Co., Ltd. (NasdaqGM: GRVY), a prominent online and mobile game developer and publisher, unveiled the success of its latest creation, Ragnarok: The New World, also known as RO 仙境傳說： 世界之旅 in Chinese. This innovative open-world MMORPG game, available on both mobile and PC platforms, was officially launched in Taiwan, Hong Kong, and Macau on January 15, 2026. Within a short span, it surged to the top position in both free downloads and top-grossing categories on the Apple App Store across all three regions, signifying a remarkable achievement for the game.

data.title: Hudbay Minerals Inc. achieved its 2025 production guidance for copper and gold. Results for three months and year ending Dec 31, 2025 were announced.
data.description: In Toronto on January 16, 2026, Hudbay Minerals Inc. (TSX, NYSE: HBM) revealed its preliminary production figures for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2025. The reported amounts are denominated in US dollars unless specified otherwise.

data.title: Important news highlights this week: 14 press releases, showcasing 2026's top jobs, ALDI's expansion, Taco Bell's budget menu, and LEGO's AI program.
data.description: In the bustling city of New York on January 16, 2026, several noteworthy updates emerged within various industries. Among them are the release of the top job opportunities for 2026, ALDI's ambitious strategies for expansion, Taco Bell unveiling a fresh budget-friendly menu, and LEGO's innovative approach with an artificial intelligence learning tool. These updates provide a glimpse into the ever-evolving landscape of business, showcasing the growing trends and advancements in the market. These developments offer insights into the future of employment, retail, and education, catering to the diverse needs and interests of consumers and professionals alike.

data.title: Doceree establishes world's largest network of 2,000+ specialist medical publishers, transforming healthcare advertising.
data.description: Two innovative AI-driven solutions are transforming the way over 2,000 specialist medical publishers and healthcare advertisers engage securely, compliantly, and on a large scale. Based in Short Hills, N.J., on January 16, 2026, Doceree unveiled its unique AI-powered Operating System for healthcare marketing.

data.title: Audi Revolut F1 Team partners with Nexo as official digital asset partner for multi-year deal - global growth accelerates.
data.description: In Switzerland, the Audi Revolut F1 Team has revealed a significant partnership with Nexo, a prominent digital assets platform, in a multi-year deal. Nexo will serve as the team's first official digital asset partner, showcasing their advanced digital tools worldwide. This collaboration signifies a crucial juncture for both entities as the Audi Revolut F1 Team debuts in Formula 1, while Nexo enhances its position as a top-tier digital asset platform. This partnership underscores the ambitious goals and performance-driven approach of both organizations.

data.title: Qnity CFO Matt Harbaugh steps down due to health reasons. Mike Goss appointed interim CFO. Comprehensive search underway.
data.description: In Wilmington, Delaware, a prominent technology solutions leader in the semiconductor industry, Qnity Electronics, Inc. ("Qnity") (NYSE: Q), made an announcement that Chief Financial Officer Matt Harbaugh has resigned from his position due to health issues. The current Principal Accounting Officer and Controller, Mike Goss, has been named as the Interim Chief Financial Officer with immediate effect. Moving forward, the company will initiate a thorough search process to fill the CFO role permanently.

data.title: Stock futures rose after positive close. TSM led chip stocks with record quarter. S&P 500 ETF up 0.30%, QQQ up 0.51%. CVX to expand Leviathan reservoir for gas production. Fed likely unchanged rates in Jan. (+) Dow 0.11%, S&P 0.28%, Nasdaq 0.47%, Russell 0.38%
data.description: U.S. stock futures saw an increase on Friday following a positive close the previous day. Major benchmark indices were on the rise, with chip stocks performing well after Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. reported a record quarter. Financials also saw gains, with Goldman Sachs Group Inc. rising over 4% and Morgan Stanley jumping nearly 6% due to strong fourth-quarter profits and upbeat results. The 10-year Treasury bond yielded 4.17%, while the two-year bond stood at 3.56%. The market pricing indicated a 95% likelihood of the Federal Reserve maintaining current interest rates in January. Dow Jones rose 0.11%, the S&P 500 by 0.28%, Nasdaq 100 by 0.47%, and Russell 2000 by 0.38%. The SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust and Invesco QQQ Trust ETF experienced gains in premarket trading. Chevron Corp. was up 0.51% in premarket as it, alongside its partners, decided to expand the Leviathan reservoir's production capacity for natural gas delivery to Israel, Egypt, and Jordan by the end of the decade. CVX maintained a strong price trend across short, medium, and long terms. The full story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: MEDIPEEL expands in Europe with Printemps debut and UK launch, strengthening K-Derma presence through CPNP compliance.
data.description: MEDIPEEL, a professional derma-aesthetic brand based in SEOUL, South Korea, is enhancing its premium K-Derma presence in Europe by ensuring compliance with EU CPNP standards and solidifying partnerships with established retailers worldwide. As of January 16, 2026, the brand is ramping up its European growth through strategic product launches and collaborations. This move is part of MEDIPEEL's efforts to strengthen its position in the European market and capitalize on its reputation for high-quality skincare products.

data.title: MTB announces Q4 2025 net income of $759M & full-year net income of $2.85B. Revenue, expenses & asset quality analyzed.$info: MTB EPS $17.00 4Q25, in millions--> net interest income $1,790, Noninterest income $696, Noninterest expense $1,379. Provision for credit losses $125 4Q25, $505 2025. Allowance for loan losses ratio 1.53%. Ratios: ROA 1.35%, CET1 10.84%, Net interest margin 3.69%. Dividends increased 11%, shares repurchased by 9%. Contact: Investor Relations -- Rajiv Ranjan 716.842.5138, Steve Wendelboe 716.842.5138. Media Relations: Frank Lentini 929.651.0447. Source: Benzinga.com.
data.description: M&T Bank Corporation reported quarterly net income of $759 million, with diluted earnings per common share at $4.67 and full-year net income of $2.85 billion with diluted earnings per common share at $17.00. Key financial indicators showcased an increase in net interest income, provision for credit losses, noninterest income, noninterest expense, and tangible equity per common share, leading to a 16% increase in diluted earnings per share from the previous year. The company also increased its quarterly dividend by 11%, repurchased 9% of outstanding shares, and grew tangible equity per common share by 7%. The Chief Financial Officer highlighted strong financial performance positioning the company for growth in the new year. Key figures like return on average assets, return on average common shareholders' equity, and capital adequacy ratios were also disclosed. The article delves into various financial metrics, asset quality, income tax rates, and forward-looking statements. M&T's capital ratios remained above regulatory minimums, with an estimated CET1 capital ratio of 10.84% at year-end 2025. The company's conference call discussed financial results, and forward-looking statements cautioned about potential uncertainties affecting business outcomes.

data.title: South Korea considers banning crypto exchanges as Google Play tightens rules, requiring FIU approval for apps.
data.description: Google is set to implement a new policy where they will demand evidence of registration acceptance from the Financial Intelligence Unit for cryptocurrency applications. This move is aimed at increasing compliance challenges for offshore exchanges that cater to users in South Korea. The requirement is likely to impact a significant number of exchanges operating in the region, highlighting the growing emphasis on regulatory compliance in the cryptocurrency industry.

data.title: Bitcoin traders foresee a significant surge as chart points to $113K target. For continued recovery, Bitcoin must close above $98K daily, indicating potential 18% increase.
data.description: Bitcoin's potential recovery hinges on maintaining a daily close above $98,000, with technical analysis suggesting a possible 18% increase in value.
